theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Emphasizes data clarity, authority, and truth—perfect for a stock prediction system that relies heavily on accurate numbers and trends.

headings.styling: tracking-tight, leading-none, stark contrast between weights

rules: No full-screen gradients. Color exists only to guide action.
95% of the UI should be monochrome (Whites, Greys, Blacks).
Use 'trend_up' and 'trend_down' ONLY for stock indicators and prediction highlights.
Never use pure black #000000 for text, use tinted grey #09090B.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, but with generous padding in structural containers (p-6, p-8).

dashboard_grid.span_logic: Charts span 2 or 3 cols, Summary metrics span 1 col.

surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-zinc-200), NO shadow by default. On hover: shadow-sm and border-zinc-300.
surfaces.headers: Solid white background (bg-white) with a hard bottom 1px border (border-zinc-200) - NO glassmorphism for finance data clarity.
surfaces.data_tables: Grid Borders style: border-collapse, visible lines for readability.

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment. Numbers in tables must be right-aligned. Labels left-aligned. Headings left-aligned.

components_strategy.structure: Raw HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts, avoiding generic Shadcn cards for the main frame to maintain a minimalist Swiss feel. Dashboard widgets use tightly padded divs with border-zinc-200.
components_strategy.interactive: Shadcn UI (heavily customized to be flat, no-radius or very small rounded-sm). Use .js/.jsx extensions.
components_strategy.forms: Shadcn Inputs, Selects. Square or sm-rounded corners. border-zinc-300, focus:ring-black.
components_strategy.charts: Recharts (Lines and Area). Must be color-blind friendly. Predictions should use a dashed line stroke (strokeDasharray='5 5') to distinguish from historical solid lines.
components_strategy.icons: lucide-react (default for clarity) or @phosphor-icons/react (for denser dashboards). Note: require yarn add if phosphor is chosen.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp color changes (e.g., text-zinc-500 to text-black). bg-zinc-50 to bg-zinc-100.
motion_and_interactions.charts_animation: Subtle path drawing animation (1.5s ease-out) on load.
motion_and_interactions.rules: Minimalist motion. No distracting bouncing or heavy parallax. Feedback must be instant.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

hero_background.description: Abstract view of modern architecture featuring reflective glass and geometric lines. Use as a subtle, low-opacity (e.g. bg-white/90 overlay) background layer for the Home/Landing page.

feature_context.description: Stock market charts displayed on digital devices. Use for About page or Project Intro sections to ground the UI in reality.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) rules. The UI should be predominantly monochrome (white, tinted greys, black).
Use color EXCLUSIVELY to signal functionality or data states (e.g., Green for Up, Red for Down). Do not use colorful gradients or backgrounds.
Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for all headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body and numbers. (Import via Google Fonts or Fontshare in the root HTML/CSS).
Do not use generic Shadcn Card shadows. Apply the 'Grid Borders' and flat surface styling: 1px borders, white background, no shadow.
Ensure the Prediction charts use Recharts, with historical data as solid lines and predicted data as dashed lines (strokeDasharray).
Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 or 4) with dense spacing (gap-4).
Ensure every interactive element has a clear hover/focus state with high contrast (e.g. focus:ring-black).
Do NOT use placeholder images. Only use the provided media URLs.
Apply `data-testid` to all interactive and data-display components.
Work with .js and .jsx files exclusively as requested. Do not implement .tsx files.
Customize Shadcn UI to fit the minimal Swiss Brutalist aesthetic. Override default border radius to `rounded-sm` or `rounded-none`.
